title: Grilled Polish Sausages with Lime
description: A simple and flavorful outdoor dish, combining the sweetness of lime juice with the savory taste of grilled Polish sausages.

ingredients.name: Polish Sausages
ingredients.notes: you can use any type of Polish sausages you like, but traditional ones are best

ingredients.name: Lime
ingredients.notes: fresh lime juice is a must for this dish

ingredients.name: Snappy Coleslaw
ingredients.notes: store-bought or homemade, it's up to you

instructions: Split the Polish sausages lengthwise and place them on the grill.
Grill for 5-7 minutes on each side, or until nicely browned.
While the sausages are grilling, prepare the coleslaw by mixing it with a squeeze of fresh lime juice.
Once the sausages are done, let them rest for a minute or two.
Warm the dinner rolls by wrapping them in foil and heating them on the grill for a few minutes.
Slice the grilled sausages and serve on top of the warm dinner rolls with a side of lime-infused coleslaw.
